phrases.intent_en: Chant 'This is Paris!' with the fans
phrases.cultural_note: The iconic PSG chant. The Virage Auteuil ultras start it, and the whole stadium joins in. Clap twice after 'Ici c'est Paris!' for the full effect.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy match tickets
phrases.text_local: Où acheter des billets pour le match ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo ahsh-TAY day bee-YEH poor luh MATCH
phrases.cultural_note: Buy on the official PSG website or app. Big matches (Marseille, Champions League) sell out fast. Resale sites are expensive — the billetterie at the stadium sometimes has last-minute tickets.
Shout this when PSG scores. You'll also hear 'But! But! But!' (Goal! Goal! Goal!) echoing through the stands. The atmosphere at Parc des Princes is electric.

phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a des visites guidées du stade ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess keel ee ah day vee-ZEET ghee-DAY doo STAHD
phrases.cultural_note: Stadium tours run on non-match days and include the locker rooms, tunnel, and pitch-side access. Book on the PSG website. The club museum showcases PSG's history.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the PSG merchandise shop is
phrases.text_local: Où est la boutique officielle du PSG ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah boo-TEEK oh-fee-SYEL doo pay-ess-ZHAY
phrases.cultural_note: The main boutique is at the stadium. There's also a megastore on the Champs-Élysées. Match-day prices are the same, but expect long lines after the game.

phrases.intent_en: Sing the rivalry chant against Marseille
phrases.text_local: Paris est magique ! L'OM est tragique !
phrases.pronunciation: pah-REE eh mah-ZHEEK! lohm eh trah-ZHEEK
phrases.cultural_note: The PSG-Marseille rivalry (Le Classique) is the biggest in French football. This playful chant is heard at every Classique. Use with caution — only at PSG home matches!
